docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CASSONE, FORTUNATA AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, CHARLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASSONE, FORTUNATA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRYANT, CHARLIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASSONE, FORTUNATA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRYANT, CHARLIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CASSONE, FORTUNATA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASSONE, FORTUNATA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRYANT, CHARLIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BRYANT, CHARLIE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT CASSONE, FORTUNATA $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,015.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 22781 ON 2-16-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF CASSONE, FORTUNATA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO CHARLIE BRYANT RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BRYANT, CHARLIE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT CASSONE, FORTUNATA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22781, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
